Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Why???

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-10-15 · 10 answers
Just tell me why!!!
user [2] · 2007-10-15
why not?
user [192] · 2007-10-15
...because
user [194] · 2007-10-15
Why?
Where?
Who?
When?
Whether?
For all fallen souls,who are now in the material universes,
Eternal questions,as we lost all knowledge...
When we were in the spiritual world,we knew everything...
And were happy in the company of the Lord....
And now,in this dark region of material existence,
Theres a tunnel of light,leading to the Lord...
The pure devotees instructions!
user [154] · 2007-10-16
ananda maya bhyasat
user [33] · 2007-10-16
Ask not "why?" but "how?".
user [19] · 2007-10-16
[quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite]Ask not "why?" but "how?".[/quote]
No!!! That'b4s what the scientists do. How this works, how that works but they dont ask themselves why!!!

So tell me why???
user [33] · 2007-10-16
[quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite][quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite]Ask not "why?" but "how?".[/quote]
No!!! That'b4s what the scientists do. How this works, how that works but they dont ask themselves why!!!

So tell me why???[/quote]

Nope, ask how. How can I best serve guru and Krishna?
user [131] · 2007-10-16
maybe.......something/someone/somehow/somewhere got out of context/morphed....and then rather than change (around) we changed.....or you did....and thats that right?
user [19] · 2007-10-17
[quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite][quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite][quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite]Ask not "why?" but "how?".[/quote]
No!!! That'b4s what the scientists do. How this works, how that works but they dont ask themselves why!!!

So tell me why???[/quote]

Nope, ask how. How can I best serve guru and Krishna?[/quote]
In that sense you are right.
user [19] · 2007-10-17
[quote][cite] Sathiya Ramakrishnan:[/cite]abhiram: No!!! That'b4s what the scientists do. How this works, how that works but they dont ask themselves why!!! So tell me why???

Well Abhiram Prabhu, we scientists do ask a lots of "whys" if the experiment is not working!!![/quote]
but I am sure the first thing you say is WHAT!!!???
